item.title: Document Template Automation
item.description:
Document Template Automation is a solution developed to improve administrative functions within Judicial Branch dependencies.

Key Features

  • Automated Templates: Automatic creation of official documents and letters
  • Technical Sheets: Automated generation of standardized technical sheets
  • Email Tracking: Automated system for correspondence registration and tracking
  • Automatic Statistics: Generation of administrative statistical reports
  • Process Standardization: Uniformization of administrative procedures

Technologies Used

  • Language: Visual Basic
  • Office Suite: Excel macros and Word templates
  • IDE: Visual Studio Code
  • Automation: VBA macros for Office

Achievements

Significant reduction in time for response and execution of administrative activities, optimizing repetitive operations and improving operational efficiency.

Impact

This project assists repetitive operations and standardizes critical processes in official documentation creation, improving productivity and consistency across judicial dependencies.

The implementation of this solution has enabled Judicial Branch dependencies to optimize their most frequent administrative processes, reducing time dedicated to repetitive tasks and improving the quality and consistency of the official documentation generated.
